name: VELOR Sales Knowledge Pack

identity.category: AI sales conversation copilot and web chat runtime
identity.positioning: VELOR helps business owners capture, answer, and act on customer buying intent inside sales conversations.

mission: Prevent purchase intent from being lost in unhandled chat conversations.
Keep owner decisions grounded in customer messages, structured catalog facts, and explicit evidence.
Give customers a public web chat channel and give owners a workspace for review, takeover, and follow-up.

implemented_capabilities.name: Public Web Chat
implemented_capabilities.truth: Opt-in tenant web chat with visitor sessions, public-safe message history, channel-scoped idempotency, rate limiting, and catalog-grounded direct answers.

implemented_capabilities.name: Owner Workspace
implemented_capabilities.truth: Customer workspace shows conversation history, Web Chat identity, suggested replies, takeover state, customer intelligence, and manual outbound replies.

implemented_capabilities.name: Canonical Intelligence
implemented_capabilities.truth: The canonical reply path prepares sales state, objection intelligence, customer needs, recommendation decision, next best action, relationship context, memory, communication profile, and trusted product context before generating or returning a reply.

implemented_capabilities.name: Owner Attention Projection
implemented_capabilities.truth: The owner attention endpoint emits only WAITING_ON_US, READY_TO_CLOSE, STUCK_ON_OBJECTION, and REGRESSING items when supported by operational state, sales state, or explicit evidence.

implemented_capabilities.name: WhatsApp QR Beta
implemented_capabilities.truth: The repository contains WhatsApp QR session/status and outbound dispatch flows. Present it as beta/self-hosted connectivity, not as the official WhatsApp Business Cloud API.

do_not_claim: Official WhatsApp Business Cloud API support unless separately integrated
allowed_claims: Can reduce missed customer follow-up when configured and monitored
Can answer product and price questions only from trusted structured catalog data
Can flag owner attention items when evidence exists
Can support a controlled pilot with explicit success metrics

best_fit: Businesses receiving repeated product, price, availability, or start-process questions in chat
Owners who need visibility into unanswered or high-intent conversations
Teams that can provide structured catalog or service data
not_best_fit: Businesses that require unsupported channels as a launch requirement
Businesses unwilling to provide trusted product/service facts
Use cases requiring legal, medical, or regulated financial advice
success_metrics: More conversations with explicit next action
Catalog answers matching trusted uploaded data
